notes: Append-only event store with envelope, validator, filter, snapshot, and cursor modules
Central event routing with namespace-scoped delivery, actor stores, and mailboxes
Actor lifecycle (create, wake, sleep, stop, crash) with supervisor restart logic
Cross-agent communication mesh with register, send, broadcast, discover, and status operations
Workspace lifecycle with status transitions, session tracking, and event-driven upserts
ProviderDescriptor with feature flags governs what the compiler emits per provider
Platform-level KV store in SQLite for skill vars, branch context, and managed state
Event projections rebuild state from event log for workspaces, sessions, and actors
Events scoped by namespace with read/write/subscribe permissions per actor
Cargo unstable feature flag separates in-progress features from the release surface
